title: Resolve XIAO S3 Wio SX1262 bridge mapping
description: The xiao_s3_wio_sx1262 fragment has no canonical composite board mapping. Define the XIAO ESP32-S3 plus Wio-SX1262 shield target and wiring or explicitly retire it.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical board/shield composition builds and reaches bridge runtime oracle, or approved retirement removes fragment and support claims.
close_reason: Retired bridge fragment with BLOCKED comments in .conf/.overlay + updated matrix per acceptance criteria; follows tbeam_supreme pattern. Commit 3c31576fb
